functions: ["Photosystem II water splitting (oxygen evolution)", "Enzyme activation (Mn-SOD)", "Nitrogen assimilation", "Shikimate pathway (phenol synthesis)"]
deficiency_name: Manganese Deficiency (Grey Speck in Oat; Pahala Blight in Sugarcane)
deficiency_visual_signs: Interveinal chlorosis of younger leaves; grey-green patches between veins; tissue may remain light green with distinct green veins; eventually necrosis; oat: 'grey speck'; cereals: stripe patterns; sugarcane: 'pahala blight'

toxicity_threshold: Mn > 300 ppm in plant tissue; worst in acid soils (pH < 5.5)

fertilizer_sources: ["MnSO4 (32% Mn) \u2014 soil or foliar", "Mn chelates \u2014 for high pH soils", "Foliar spray: MnSO4 0.5% (5g/L)"]
